title: Add time filtering to history search

log.context: Add time filtering to history search

Done. Here is what was added to `/mnt/data/scripts/history`:

**New flags:**
- `--after DATE` -- post-filters (or SQL-filters in chrono mode) to messages on or after the given date (YYYY-MM-DD or ISO 8601)
- `--before DATE` -- same, for messages on or before the date
- `--chrono` / `--chronological` -- skips embedding/vector search entirely, returns messages in ascending chronological order via plain SQL
- `--newest` -- same as chrono but descending (newest first)
